content:
# Gold Plus Savings Account Terms

## Account Profile
Gold Plus Savings Account is a Northstar Bank deposit account classified as savings and available for personal customers. Position it as a personal savings option when a customer asks for this account by name or when the comparison discussion is limited to savings products. See "Savings Account Comparison Guide" when the customer is choosing among savings accounts rather than asking about Gold Plus Savings Account specifically.

## Rates and Opening Amount
- Annual percentage yield: 3.8
- Minimum opening deposit: 2500

The minimum opening deposit is required to open this account. Do not describe a lower trial deposit, alternate funding minimum, or non-personal ownership option for this product.

## Monthly Fee Treatment
Gold Plus Savings Account has a monthly fee of 0. The fee waiver balance is 0, so do not add a separate balance condition when explaining monthly maintenance cost for this account.

## Closing Cost Window
An early closure fee of 75 applies within the early closure window of 180 days. For employee steps and confirmation requirements, use "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy" rather than adding closure instructions to this product page.
title: Gold Plus Savings Account Terms
